Chronology of every recorded fact about [[dragon's breath]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — It takes Lindon too long to form his dragon's breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — dragon's breath is a technique Lindon uses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Dragon's breath is a technique Lindon uses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon uses dragon's breath to strike the gatestone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon gathered dragon's breath into his left hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Orthos's dragon's breath is arm-thick.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon can use dragon's breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon unleashed a bar of dragon's breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon kindled dragon's breath in his free hand.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon can hurl a dragon's breath upward.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon can unleash dragon's breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon wins against Pride by peppering him with dragon's breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon conjures dragon's breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Dragon's breath is a technique used by dragons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon draws dragon's breath into his hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon uses dragon's breath as an attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Dragon's breath can be shot as bars of energy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — A spear of dragon's breath breaks through the cloud.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon uses dragon's breath to take out dreadbeasts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon can use dragon's breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Lindon blasted dragon's breath through Sophara's chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Orthos can cycle madra into dragon's breath.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Dragon's breath is a force of destruction.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon could have used dragon's breath with his other hand.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon's dragon's breath was composed of soulfire, madra, and authority.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon uses dragon's breath in combat.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Orthos unleashes a flow of dragon's breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — The Weeping Dragon's breath is a deadly offensive technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Orthos blasted a construct apart with dragon’s breath.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
